title: crataegus × sudetica
intro: Crataegus × sudetica, also known as the Sudeten hawthorn, is a hybrid plant species within the Crataegus genus, combining the characteristics of Crataegus monogyna and Crataegus nigra. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in relation to cardiovascular health, where it is believed to have flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins that may help to improve heart function and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Crataegus × sudetica include potential antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to support the cardiovascular system and reduce the risk of certain cardiovascular diseases. Crataegus × sudetica is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with its herbal preparations available in various forms to support heart health.
